raw_consumer_statement: Several years ago, I put down a deposit on a cruise vacation. I changed the date of the cruise and then subsquently, in XX/XX/year>, I opted to cancel the trip. The cruise company ( XXXX, under their parent XXXX ) told me that they would refund my deposit back to the original payment method. The deposit was never refunded. I called both the vendor again, and was told that they processed the refund and that it was out of their hands as to when the credit would be applied by Citibank on the credit card. It never appeared. I called both the card and the merchant several times and finally filed a dispute in writing with Citi. However, they first damaged my dispute letter and asked me to refile it. Subsequently, they just closed the dispute saying that too much time had passed to investigate. I don't know where the money is ( whether XXXX had ever actually processed the refund to Citi or whether Citi got the refund by has never credited my account ).
